channel.title: Posts on Alix Pham
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Alix Pham

item.title: Some resources
item.description: A living list of things I find genuinely useful — templates, tools, links, and questions.

item.title: How I built this website
item.description: This site is built with Hugo and hosted on GitHub Pages. I initially set it up in 2023, and now maintain and update it with the help of AI (Claude Code). Setup Install dependencies Git Hugo Set up a GitHub Pages repo Follow these instructions Create the Hugo site and add a theme Run hugo new site <<your repo name>> --force Download a theme, e.g. Poison If you won’t modify the theme: git clone <<theme-url>> /themes/<<theme name>> If you will make changes: fork the theme repo, then git submodule add <<forked-theme-url>> themes/<<theme-name>> Add content and test locally Edit config.

item.title: Some resources
item.description: A living list of things I find genuinely useful — templates, tools, links, and questions.
